Universal and Transferable Adversarial Attacks on Aligned Language Models

representative_papers.title: Language Models (Mostly) Know What They Know

Calibrating Large Language Models with Conformal Prediction

Rethinking Benchmark and Contamination for LLMs with Rephrased Samples
Benchmark Data Contamination of Large Language Models: A Survey

limitations: Access to model internals often needed

Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback
Direct Preference Optimization

dimensions.name: RAG and Compound System Evaluation
dimensions.description: Evaluation of retrieval-augmented generation and multi-component AI systems

representative_papers.title: RAGAS: Automated Evaluation of Retrieval Augmented Generation
ARES: An Automated Evaluation Framework for RAG Systems
LongBench: A Bilingual, Multitask Benchmark for Long Context Understanding

cross_cutting_gaps.name: Lack of Formal Stability Guarantees
cross_cutting_gaps.description: Current metrics have no formal bounds on how they change under input perturbation

cross_cutting_gaps.name: Non-Composable Evaluations
cross_cutting_gaps.description: Local evaluations cannot be formally combined into consistent global assessments

cross_cutting_gaps.name: No Geometric Framework for Drift Detection
cross_cutting_gaps.description: No principled way to measure how model behavior distributions change over time
cross_cutting_gaps.mathematical_remedy: Information geometry (Fisher-Rao distance on statistical manifolds)

cross_cutting_gaps.name: Invisible Structural Failure Modes
cross_cutting_gaps.description: Pointwise metrics miss systematic patterns of correlated failures
cross_cutting_gaps.mathematical_remedy: TDA on failure landscapes (persistent homology of error patterns)

cross_cutting_gaps.name: Surface-Level Contamination Detection
cross_cutting_gaps.description: Current methods detect contamination at string/embedding level, missing structural signals
cross_cutting_gaps.mathematical_remedy: Random matrix theory (spectral anomaly detection via Marchenko-Pastur)

cross_cutting_gaps.name: No Unifying Mathematical Framework
cross_cutting_gaps.description: Each evaluation dimension uses ad-hoc metrics without common mathematical language
cross_cutting_gaps.mathematical_remedy: Category-theoretic unification via sheaves and functorial evaluation
